gate.title: Turn on location
gate.body: FixIt uses your location to connect you with nearby technicians. The app can't be used until location is enabled.
gate.backgroundBody: FixIt shares your live location with the customer while you head to a job, so location must be set to "Allow all the time".
gate.deniedHint: Location permission is off. Turn it on in Settings to continue.
gate.servicesHint: Your device's location is turned off. Turn it on to continue.
gate.backgroundHint: Set location access to "Allow all the time" to keep tracking active.
